title: 'Achiycamak #0294
definition:
Ahisamach = "my brother is support (has supported)"

 1) a Danite, father of Aholiab, a workman on the tabernacle
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ahisamach = "my brother is support (has supported)"

 1) a Danite, father of Aholiab, a workman on the tabernacle

    NASB:  my brother has supported, an Isr.
